title: Chocolate Cake
excerpt: I got this chocolate cake recipe from my mom. I've baked it so many times for every kind of occasion. It's a lovely moist cake and keeps for at least 3 days. How you decorate it is up to you. I decorated mine on top with Caramel Treat and pretty little flowers. …
html:
I got this chocolate cake recipe from my mom. I've baked it so many times for every kind of occasion. It's a lovely moist cake and keeps for at least 3 days. How you decorate it is up to you. I decorated mine on top with Caramel Treat and pretty little flowers. Between the two layers I put berry jam and Caramel Treat.

Ingredients

  • 4 eggs
  • 340 ml sugar
  • 40 ml apricot jam
  • 2.5 ml salt
  • 200 ml boiling water + 50 ml brandy
  • 125 ml oil
  • 125 ml cocoa
  • 500 ml cake flour
  • 15 ml baking powder

Method

  1. In your mixing bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, apricot jam and salt together with an electric mixer until light and creamy.
  2. In a jug mix the boiling water and brandy, cocoa and oil. All the cocoa must be dissolved.
  3. Now sift the cake flour and baking powder into your egg mixture.
  4. Add the cocoa mixture and beat everything together very well
  5. Grease two cake pans and divide the mixture between the two pans. Tap the pans on the table so all the air bubbles in your batter can pop.
  6. Bake for 30 - 35 minutes at 180C

Let the cake cool well before you decorate it.

Buttercream Icing

  • 500g icing sugar, sifted
  • 250 g soft butter
  • 60 ml cocoa powder
  • 5 ml vanilla
  • 60 ml milk
  1. In your mixing bowl, cream the butter and vanilla until light.
  2. Add the sifted icing sugar and cocoa and beat
  3. Now add the milk and beat.
